Enterprise

AI coaching
for your team.

Custom personas, enterprise security, and the support your organization needs to thrive.

Request Demo View Pricing →

Benefits

Why organizations choose Ferni

Employee Wellbeing

24/7 support for stress, career development, and personal growth. No scheduling, no stigma, no waitlists.

Custom Personas

Build AI personas trained on your company's knowledge, culture, and processes. Onboarding, internal support, and more.

Enterprise Security

SOC 2 compliance, SSO, data residency options, and enterprise-grade encryption. Your data stays yours.

Analytics & Insights

Aggregate insights into team wellbeing and usage patterns. Anonymous and privacy-preserving.

Global Availability

Support teams across time zones with 24/7 availability. Phone, web, and API access.

Dedicated Support

Named account manager, priority support, and custom integration assistance.

Use Cases

How teams use Ferni

Employee Coaching

On-demand coaching for career development, stress management, and personal growth. Scales to your entire organization.

Onboarding Assistant

Custom persona trained on your company's processes, culture, and knowledge base. New hires get answers instantly.

Internal Support

HR, IT, and benefits questions answered 24/7. Reduce ticket volume while improving employee experience.

Manager Training

Practice difficult conversations, get feedback on communication, and develop leadership skills.

Enterprise-Grade Security

Your data is protected with the highest standards of security and compliance.

SOC 2 Type II GDPR Compliant SSO/SAML End-to-End Encryption Data Residency Options

Let's talk about your team

Tell us about your organization and we'll show you how Ferni can help.

The AI that actually listens. Six specialists, one conversation, infinite memory.
